reason: This is a poetic tweet expressing longing and waiting, using metaphors about migrating birds and absent loved ones. It contains no extremist content, violence, or ISIS-related themes.
original_post: كَمْ مِنْ الأَغصَانْ تَنتظِر طُيورٌ مَهاجِرهْ وَكمْ مِنْ القُلوبْ تَنتظِر أَحَباباً غَائِبونْ ‼
